description:
DEPRECATED:
This endpoint is not accurate across time zones and has been deprecated. It will be removed in a future version of the API. Use the Schedule Tasks, Calendar Items, and Schedule endpoints instead.

List all Calendar Events for a specified project.

schedule_tasks_last_updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent change to any task in the schedule

name.description: Task name as the user sees it in Procore. Depending on the project settings this may include the full outline path

task_name.description: Task name. This will always contain just the task name, and will not include the full outline path.

key.description:
A deprecated value which was originally used to uniquely identify tasks.
This value will be removed in a later version of the API.

start_datetime.description: Task start timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC format.

finish_datetime.description: Task finish timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC format.

percentage.description: Percent complete value for this task.

color.description:
The RGB color value, expressed in hex digits for the color used when
displaying the task in Procore. The color varies depending on whether
the task is on the critical path, complete, unstarted or i...

pending.description: True if one or more change requests are pending for this task.

activity_id.description:
The external unique identifier for this task. Note that due to an
oversight in the original API, the value returned for this attribute
will be the `source_uid` value supplied when creating a task.

schedule_activity_id.description:
For tasks imported from external systems which have the concept of
an "Activity ID" (for example Primavera P6), this attribute is
used to hold the Activity ID value. Note that due to an oversight
d...

resource_name.description: Names of any resources assigned to this task.

critical_path.description: True if this task is on the critical path.

milestone.description: True if this task is a milestone.

actual_start.description: Actual start timestamp for this task in ISO 8601 UTC format.

actual_finish.description: Actual finish timestamp for this task in ISO 8601 UTC format.

row_number.description:
The row number of a task defines the sequence in which tasks are normally
expected to be displayed.

has_children.description: True if this is a summary task, i.e. this task has child tasks.

source_uid.description:
The unique identifier for this task from the external system which
owns the schedule data.

wbs.description: Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) number for this task.

schedule_duration.description:
The duration of this task in days as defined by the external system
which owns the schedule data.

resource_ids.description:
The resources assigned to this task, represented as an array of
resource ID values.

baseline_start.description: The baseline start timestamp for this task in ISO 8601 UTC format.

baseline_finish.description: The baseline finish timestamp for this task in ISO 8601 UTC format.

start_variance.description: The start variance in days for this task.

finish_variance.description: The finish variance in days for this task.

manually_edited.description:
Set to true if the task has been created or modified in Procore, false
if the task was imported from an external schedule and has not been
modified in Procore.

created_at.description: Date/time the Task was created in ISO 8601 UTC format.

updated_at.description: Date/time the Task was last updated in ISO 8601 UTC format.

full_outline_path.description: ToDo full outline path (corresponds to matching field on Tasks)

task_name.description: ToDo name (corresponds to matching field on Tasks)

updated_at.description: Date/time the ToDo was last updated
